message.content:
First, the date is November 23, 2020, which is the date of the OCR text. Then, the main subject is the Intel Corporation's Summary Annual Report for their welfare benefits and retirement plans. The key dates are the 201/01/2019 to 12/31/2019 period. The key places are the U.S. Department of Labor, Employee Benefits Security Administration, and the various health and welfare benefit plans. The key names are the Intel Corporation, the various plans like Health and Welfare Benefit Plan, Short-Term Disability Plan, etc. The key numbers are the EIN 94-1172743, the 2019 Form 500, and the various insurance companies like CIGNA, Anthem, etc. The key dates are the filing of the annual reports in October 2020, and the distribution of the reports within two months of the filing. The key places are the U.S. and the various health insurance providers. The key names are the Intel Corporation, the various plans, and the insurance companies involved in the plans.
</think>

November 23, 2020 marked the date of the OCR text. The Intel Corporation issued a Summary Annual Report for their welfare benefits and retirement plans from January 1, 2019, to December 31, 2019. The reports were filed with the U.S. Department of Labor's Employee Benefits Security Administration under the Employee Retirement Income Security Act of 1974. Key plans included the Health and Welfare Benefit Plan, Short-Term Disability Plan, Business Travel Accident Plan, Flexible Spending Account, Group Accidental Death and Dismemberment Plan, Group Life Insurance Plan, Retiree Medical Plan, Critical Illness Insurance Plan, Long-Term Care Insurance Plan, Prepaid Legal Services Plan, and Supplemental Long-Term Disability Insurance Plan. The self-insured options were managed by CIGNA, Anthem, Aetna, RightCHOICE, and various insurance providers like Kaiser Permanente and Delta Dental. The annual reports were filed in October 2020 and distributed to participants within two months of the filing. The OCR text included details about the plans, insurance providers, and the process for distributing the reports.

__verbose.prompt:
<|im_start|>system
You are an expert reader able to generate the best concise summaries of any single page text document. You can determine accuratedly relevant dates such as: the date of service of a medical bill, the publishing date of a research paper, the date of service of a utility bill, the date of a letter. You can accurately find the main subject of the page such as: patient name of a medical bill, home owner from a utility bill, the receipient of a letter. By reading the begining of a page you can determine the page number is available.
<|im_end|>
<|im_start|>user
Next is the text from an scanned page passe through an OCR engine, sorrounded by the tags `===OCR Text Start Here===` and `===OCR Text Ends Here===`.

===OCR Text Start Here===
![image](image_1.png)130,87,865,210

November 23, 2020

## 2019 Summary Annual Report of the Intel Corporation Welfare Benefits and Retirement Plans

As a participant or beneficiary of an Intel-sponsored welfare benefit plan and/or retirement plan, you are entitled to receive a Summary Annual Report of these plans. This information is outlined in the content that follows.

Not all recipients of this document may be eligible participants in all plans described below.

No action is required on your part. The 2019 Form 5500 annual reports (the “annual reports”) were filed with the appropriate U.S. governmental agencies in October 2020 as required by law. Summary Annual Reports are distributed to all active and retired plan participants within two months of this filing.

### Questions?

For questions, contact the Intel Health Benefits Center at: (877-466-9236) GoMyBen, Monday through Friday, 7 a.m. to 5 p.m. Pacific.

## 2019 Summary Annual Report of the Intel Corporation Welfare Benefits Plans

The following are the Summary Annual Reports for Intel’s welfare benefits plans for the period January 1, 2019 through December 31, 2019. The annual reports have been filed with the Employee Benefits Security Administration, U.S. Department of Labor, as required under the Employee Retirement Income Security Act of 1974 (ERISA).

- Summary Annual Report for the Intel Corporation Health and Welfare Benefit Plan
- Summary Annual Report for the Intel Corporation Short-Term Disability Plan
- Summary Annual Report for the Intel Corporation Business Travel Accident Plan
- Summary Annual Report for the Intel Corporation Flexible Spending Account
- Summary Annual Report for the Intel Corporation Group Accidental Death and Dismemberment Plan
- Summary Annual Report for the Intel Corporation Group Life Insurance Plan
- Summary Annual Report for the Intel Corporation Retiree Medical Plan
- Summary Annual Report for the Intel Corporation Critical Illness Insurance Plan
- Summary Annual Report for the Intel Corporation Long-Term Care Insurance Plan
- Summary Annual Report for the Intel Corporation Prepaid Legal Services Plan
- Summary Annual Report for the Intel Corporation Supplemental Long-Term Disability Insurance Plan

## Health and Welfare Benefit Plan (Plan #501, EIN 94-1672743)

The Intel Corporation Health and Welfare Benefit Plan provides medical, vision and dental benefits. The Plan has self-insured options and insured options. The self-insured options claims administration is delegated to CIGNA, Anthem, Aetna Life Insurance Company, and RightCHOICE Benefit Administrator for Connected Care ACN (Arizona) and Connected Care California. Providence Health Plan, Presbyterian Health Plan for the Presbyterian Health Plan HMO and NM Connected Care, Kaiser Foundation, Kaiser Permanente Insurance Company (“KPIC”) for the Connected Care Kaiser options, Delta Dental of California for the Intel Dental Plan, Vision Service Plan and Express Scripts. Intel Corporation has committed itself to pay certain claims incurred under the terms of the plan for the self-insured options.
===OCR Text Ends Here===

Your task is provide a short summary of no more than 10 sentences long. Include key dates, places, and names. It must be a single continuos paragrapha. Do not include bullet points or tabled.
<|im_end|>
<|im_start|>assistant
<think>
I will start by recognizing the date, then the subject and write 10 bullet points to draft the summary.
